message:
test: Verify Prow CI fixes

Test PR to verify the Prow job fixes from kubestellar/infra#73:
- uv sync now uses --python-preference only-system
- Should use container Python 3.11/3.12 instead of downloading 3.14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+# KubeStellar A2A - Agent-to-Agent communication library
 [project]
 name = "kubestellar"
 version = "0.1.0"
